google_reputation.explanation: Google rating is weak at 3.8, reducing score by 25. Google review count is 43, reducing score by 20.
weaknesses: Google rating is below the preferred trust range.
Google review count is low for a competitive service market.
recommended_improvements: Launch a structured Google review growth process.
Begin requesting Google Reviews after every completed project.

revenue_opportunities.opportunity: Increase conversion by improving visible customer trust.
Increase local credibility and quote requests.

competitive_position.explanation: Competitor average rating is 4.8, 1.0 higher, reducing score by 15. Competitors average 314 reviews, 270 more, reducing score by 30.
weaknesses: Competitors hold a meaningful rating advantage.
Competitors have a severe review-volume advantage.
recommended_improvements: Prioritize reputation recovery and review quality.
Treat reputation growth as a primary recovery initiative.

revenue_opportunities.opportunity: Recover leads lost to higher-rated competitors.
Recover demand that is likely going to more visible competitors.

digital_presence.explanation: Website status was unavailable, so no website penalty was applied. Facebook page status was unavailable, so no Facebook penalty was applied.

automation_readiness.explanation: Missed calls reduce automation readiness by 25. Quote delays reduce automation readiness by 25. Poor communication reduces automation readiness by 20. Technician timing issues reduce automation readiness by 10.
weaknesses: Missed inbound calls are present.
Quote delays are present.
Customer communication is inconsistent.
Technician timing issues are present.
recommended_improvements: Install AI Receptionist or missed-call text back.
Automate quote follow-up and reminders.
Automate customer communication touchpoints.
Use scheduling and ETA notifications.

revenue_opportunities.opportunity: Capture leads that would otherwise be lost.
Increase quote conversion and reduce lead leakage.
Improve response consistency and customer experience.
Improve customer experience with scheduling automation.

revenue_opportunity.explanation: Estimated revenue leakage is $135,250, adding 35 opportunity points. Competitor review gap is 270, adding 25 opportunity points. Competitor rating gap is 1.0, adding 10 opportunity points.
weaknesses: Estimated revenue leakage is high.
Competitors have a large review advantage.
Competitors have a clear rating advantage.
recommended_improvements: Prioritize revenue recovery systems within the next 90 days.
Use reputation growth to recover local search demand.
